Trails Mapped

Difficulty Levels
SoCal
Wilderness Areas

🌄 Trail Guides

Discover pristine off-road trails through mountains, deserts, and wilderness

Moderate to Advanced

Holcomb Creek Trail

Big Bear, CA

A challenging but rewarding rock crawling trail in the Big Bear area.

Rock CrawlMountain
Maps
Easy to Moderate

Mojave Road (West/Central)

Mojave National Preserve, CA

Explore the historic Mojave Road, great for beginners with 4WD.

DesertHistoric
Maps
Moderate

Ocotillo Wells SVRA

Ocotillo, CA

Vast desert playground with sand dunes and trails for all skill levels.

Sand DunesDesert
Maps
Moderate

Berdoo Canyon Trail

Joshua Tree National Park, CA

A scenic desert trail with unique rock formations.

DesertScenic
Maps
Easy

Coxey Road

Anza-Borrego Desert State Park, CA

An easy desert road leading to historical sites within Anza-Borrego.

DesertHistoric
Maps
Moderate

Rainbow Trail

San Bernardino Mountains, CA

A scenic trail with great views and moderate obstacles.

MountainScenic
Maps
Moderate

Gold Fever Trail

Big Bear, CA

Follow the path of gold prospectors in this historic mountain trail.

MountainHistoric Mines
Maps
Moderate to Extreme

Dumont Dunes

Near Baker, CA

Famous for dune buggying and sand rail riding.

Sand DunesOHV
Maps
Moderate

Thimble Trail

Ocotillo Wells SVRA, CA

A moderate trail with rocky sections in Ocotillo Wells.

DesertRock
Maps
Easy to Moderate

Cleghorn Ridge Trail

Cajon Pass, CA

Scenic ridge trail with optional harder sections. Great introduction with stunning views.

MountainBeginner Friendly
Maps
Advanced

John Bull Trail

Holcomb Valley, Big Bear, CA

Serious rock crawling with optional bypasses. Skids and lockers strongly recommended.

Rock CrawlChallenging
Maps
Moderate

Odessa-Doran Loop

Johnson Valley, CA

A popular loop trail in Johnson Valley.

DesertLoop
Maps
Extreme

Outer Limits Trail

Johnson Valley, CA

Known for its extreme rock obstacles and challenges.

Rock CrawlExtreme
Maps
Moderate

Jack North Trail

San Bernardino Mountains, CA

A moderate mountain trail with scenic views.

MountainScenic
Maps
Moderate

Big Johnson Trail

San Bernardino, CA

A moderate trail featuring rocky terrain.

MountainRocky
Maps
Easy

Idyllwild Mountain Road

Idyllwild, CA

A scenic drive through the mountains to Idyllwild.

MountainScenic
Maps
Moderate

Thomas Mountain Road

Idyllwild, CA

A moderate climb with expansive views of the San Jacinto Valley.

MountainScenic Climb
Maps
Advanced

San Jacinto Ridge Trail

San Jacinto Mountains, CA

A strenuous trail along the San Jacinto ridge.

MountainChallenging
Maps
Moderate

Arrowhead North Loop

Lake Arrowhead, CA

A scenic loop trail around Lake Arrowhead.

MountainLoop
Maps
Extreme

RC3331 Rattlesnake Canyon

San Bernardino Mountains, CA

Severe rock gardens, ledges, and tight squeezes. Winch likely needed.

Rock CrawlSevere
Maps
Moderate

Borrego Mountain Wash Trail

Anza-Borrego Desert State Park, CA

A moderate desert trail through a wash, often good after rain.

DesertWash Trail
Maps
Moderate

Truckhaven Trail

Ocotillo Wells SVRA, CA

A popular desert trail known for its sandy sections.

DesertSand
Maps

"Leave no trace, take only memories" 🌲

🦅 Recovery Resources

Stuck in the wilderness? These trail angels have your back

SoCal Crwlr

Available Now

All SoCal OHV Areas • Winch • Tow Straps • Recovery Rig

Contact @socal_crwlr

Rugged Repair

Mobile Tech

Trail-Side Repairs • Welding • Tools • Get you rolling again

Contact @rugged_repair
🏔️

SoCal Off-Roaders

Your guide to Southern California's wilderness trails. Respect the land, tread lightly, and preserve these wild places for future generations.

Connect

  • @noah2131
  • @chevys.offroad

Trail Ethics

  • 🌲 Stay on designated trails
  • 🗑️ Pack it in, pack it out
  • 🐾 Respect wildlife
  • 🤝 Help fellow wheelers

© 2026 SoCal Off-Roaders — Tread Lightly • Leave No Trace
